parallel_trends.interpretation: Failure to reject does not prove parallel trends; it only reports whether detectable annual pre-period differences are present.

no_anticipation.reason: Pillar Two announcements occurred in 2021-2022 before the January 2024 implementation indicator.

no_time_varying_unobserved_confounding.reason: Firm and month fixed effects do not absorb firm-specific time-varying shocks.
